Localization.Description: Events of the Sysmon integration module

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The Sysmon utility already installed on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility already started on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility updated on host {event_src.host}
Failed to install the Sysmon utility on host {event_src.host}
Failed to update the Sysmon utility configuration on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility uninstalled on host {event_src.host}
Failed to uninstall the Sysmon utility on host {event_src.host}
Failed to update the Sysmon utility on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility configuration updated on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility installed on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility already uninstalled on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility started on host {event_src.host}
The Sysmon utility stopped on host {event_src.host}
Failed to start the Sysmon utility on host {event_src.host}
